description: Monthly egress test - exit sign at Delco Plaza unit 4 failed to illuminate on battery. LED head dark, test button no response. Replaced exit/emergency combo unit and verified 90-minute discharge. Logged for code records.
short_description: Exit light test failed - Delco Plaza unit 4

description: Parking lot pole light out at Brighton Pointe - northeast corner pole, head 3. Suspect failed photocell or ballast. Darren to scope with bucket truck next visit. Two adjacent heads still working.
short_description: Parking lot pole light out - Brighton Pointe

description: Storefront panel breaker tripping intermittently at Maple Street Cafe - 20A circuit feeding espresso machine and back counter. Megged the run, found load near rating. Recommending dedicated circuit. Reset and monitoring.
short_description: Breaker tripping in storefront panel - Maple Street Cafe

description: Emergency lighting battery replacement at Ridgeway Office Park - two units in stairwell B failed the 90-minute test. Darren swapped batteries and re-tested. Both holding charge now.
short_description: Emergency lighting battery replacement - Ridgeway stairwell B

description: EV charger fault code at Concord Crossing retail lot - unit 2 showing ground fault lockout. Cleared fault, inspected J1772 connector for moisture ingress. Tightened lugs at the disconnect. Charger back in service.
short_description: EV charger fault code - Concord Crossing lot

description: GFCI nuisance trip at Lansdowne Medical Plaza break room. Resets but trips again under microwave load. Replaced GFCI receptacle - the old one was 2014 stock and worn. No further trips on test.
short_description: GFCI nuisance trip - Lansdowne break room

description: GC handover at Hargrove jobsite - need panel directory relabeled before final inspection. Walking the building to verify each circuit and printing new typed directory. Coordinating with Raj on inspection date.
short_description: Panel directory relabel - GC handover

description: Flickering fluorescent fixtures in Broad Street Hardware aisle 3. Likely failing ballast or aged T8 lamps. Darren to relamp and check ballast. Quoting LED retrofit if ballast is gone.
short_description: Flickering aisle lighting - Broad Street Hardware

description: Half of suite lost power at Westgate Commons unit 6. Found a loose neutral on the panel feeder bus. Re-terminated and torqued to spec. Voltage balanced across legs now. Recommend follow-up thermal scan.
short_description: Partial power loss - Westgate Commons unit 6

description: Photocell stuck on at Aldan Business Center - exterior wall packs burning during daylight. Replaced photocell sensor and verified dusk-to-dawn operation. Saving the account on energy.
short_description: Exterior wall packs on during day - Aldan

description: Walk-in cooler tripping breaker at Sharon Hill Pharmacy. Compressor pulling high locked-rotor on start. Checked contactor and start capacitor. Recommending dedicated 30A circuit - current one is shared.
short_description: Walk-in cooler tripping breaker - Sharon Hill Pharmacy

description: Temporary power needed at Beacon jobsite for second-floor framing. Set up spider box off the temp service, GFCI protected. Verified bonding and stake ground. Darren tagged the assembly.
short_description: Temporary power setup - Beacon jobsite 2nd floor

description: Gate operator dead at Glenolden Self Storage main entrance. No power at the operator board. Traced to tripped GFCI in the curbside pedestal damaged by water. Replaced in-use cover and GFCI. Gate cycling normally.
short_description: Gate operator no power - Glenolden Self Storage

description: Two parking lot heads out at Marple Crossing Retail near the loading dock. Both LED drivers failed. Darren swapped drivers from stock and re-aimed fixtures. Lot fully lit again.
short_description: Parking lot heads out - Marple Crossing loading dock

description: Dryer circuit smells hot at Drexel Hill Dry Cleaners. Found discolored 30A breaker and pitted contacts. Replaced breaker and re-terminated load conductors. Thermal scan clean after 30 minutes of run.
short_description: Overheating dryer circuit - Drexel Hill Dry Cleaners

description: Quarterly exit/emergency light test at Folsom Trade Center. Tested 14 units across three suites - 11 pass, 3 failed battery. Darren replaced the three batteries and logged results for the binder.
short_description: Quarterly egress lighting test - Folsom Trade Center

description: Receptacle dead in Springfield Commerce Plaza suite 2 conference room. Open neutral on a backstabbed device upstream. Pigtailed the run and replaced the failed receptacle. Whole circuit tested and torqued.
short_description: Dead receptacle circuit - Springfield Commerce suite 2

description: Sign lighting out at Yeadon Corner Market storefront. Channel letter transformer failed. Darren replaced the LED power supply and verified all letters lit. Recommended whole-sign retrofit next cycle.
short_description: Storefront sign lighting out - Yeadon Corner Market

description: Raj asked for a load calculation before adding two rooftop units at the Hargrove jobsite. Pulled panel schedule and existing demand. Service has capacity but need a subfeed. Writing up findings for the PM.
short_description: Load calc request for rooftop units - Hargrove jobsite

description: Bollard lights out along the Concord Crossing walkway - four of six dark. Wiring nicked by landscaping. Darren made repairs in a junction box, sealed, and re-energized. All six lit.
short_description: Walkway bollard lights out - Concord Crossing

description: Surge event at Westgate Commons after utility blink - several tenants reporting tripped GFCIs and dead transformers for low-voltage lighting. Brandon walked units 1-4, reset devices, replaced two failed drivers. Recommending whole-building surge protection.
short_description: Surge damage after utility blink - Westgate Commons

description: Restroom occupancy sensor switch not turning lights on at Maple Street Cafe. Sensor failed. Darren replaced the occupancy sensor switch and set the timeout. Lights cycling correctly.
short_description: Occupancy sensor failure - Maple Street Cafe restroom
